title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SIDBI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SIDBI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
